platform_decisions.content: Hook system event-driven architecture with discriminator-based event model (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, etc.)
Async hook registry with configurable timeouts (default 15s) and progress callbacks
Hook matcher-based tool filtering — empty matcher means all tools, named matchers filter per tool call
PreToolUse hooks can emit permissionDecision and permissionDecisionReason to override tool invocation
Sync vs async hook response types via discriminator pattern
Command lazy loading and feature-gating via dynamic requires deferred until first build
Multi-source command aggregation: built-in + skills + plugins + bundled + workflows
Command availability filter (auth type) applied before enablement (feature flags) — separate concerns
Command type hierarchy: prompt (expansion), local (sync TSX), local-jsx (async React)
MCP transport type abstraction: stdio, sse, http, ws, sdk, claudeai-proxy
MCP server state machine: connected, failed, needs-auth, pending, disabled with backoff reconnection
MCP config scope cascade from 7 scopes with later overriding earlier
MCP server dedup by signature (command array or URL) to prevent duplicate tool registrations
Atomic MCP config writes via temp file + datasync + rename pattern
API client multi-provider: direct, Bedrock, Foundry, Vertex selected at runtime via env vars
Credential refresh at request time with cache-and-retry on failure
Client-side request ID injection via x-client-request-id for debugging (1P API only)
Retry strategy: 529 foreground-only retry (max 3), exponential backoff for others
Error classification and triage with specific recovery strategies per error category
Settings loaded from 7 sources with later overriding earlier; arrays deduped, objects recursed
Managed settings drop-in architecture: base + alphabetical drop-ins for independent policy fragments
Settings change detection via chokidar (1s stability, 30s grace) + MDM polling (30min)
Settings cache with lifecycle state — cleared on /clear, /compact, or schema update
Permission rule validation with custom errors; invalid rules filtered not blocking
Settings backward compat via z.passthrough() — unknown fields preserved across schema updates
System prompt sections computed once and cached; DANGEROUS_uncachedSection for volatile content
Hooks defined in settings by event type with matcher array and type (bash-command, http, prompt, agent)
Config change hooks notify plugins/hooks on settings file changes
Feature flag conditional imports for dead-code elimination at build time
Custom API headers via ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS env var, merged with defaults
Model provider selection deferred to request time so env var changes propagate
Bootstrap state isolation: minimal global singleton with resetStateForTests()
Hook response aggregation: most-restrictive permission wins, all blocking errors reported
Tool-specific hook context with toolUseID and hook index for unique env paths
Command context dependency injection via ToolUseContext with runtime config callbacks
Skill root env var CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT for portable asset paths
Fork vs inline skill execution: fork runs as sub-agent, inline inherits conversation state
Command disableability via isEnabled() separate from availability (auth type)
MCP OAuth config cascade with XAA shared IdP support
Elicitation handler for async consent with timeout-to-decline default
Immutable AppState with reducer pattern (createStore) — all changes via setState updater functions
One QueryEngine per conversation; state persists across turns (messages, fileReadCache, usage)
AsyncGenerator-based query loop for real-time streaming of events to UI
Stateful query loop with continue sites for recovery from max_output_tokens and prompt_too_long
Multi-layer compaction: snip (history truncation) + microcompact (tool result compression) + autocompact (full summarization)
Forked agents inherit cache-safe params from parent for API response cache hits
CacheSafeParams saved at turn end for post-turn forks to reuse prompt cache
File cache cloning for subagent isolation — subagent reads dont evict parent cache
Permission denial tracking for SDK reporting via SDKPermissionDenial entries
Auto-memory directory with 4-type taxonomy (user, feedback, project, reference) and MEMORY.md index (200 lines, 25KB max)
Dual-gate auto-consolidation (dream): time gate (24h) + session gate (5 sessions) + lock coordination
Auto-extraction at turn end via stop hooks with restricted permissions (read-only + memory dir write)
Session memory as separate periodic transcript summarization to session.md
ToolPermissionContext frozen at conversation start — immutable mode + rules
ToolUseContext carries mutable execution state, cloned/isolated for subagents
AppState carries UI state decoupled from API state (statusLine, expandedView, footer)
Session bootstrap state machine: single global singleton for session lifecycle
Feature gate latching for prompt cache stability — once latched, dynamic changes dont flip header
Three-tier model selection: CLI flag > userSettings.model > getDefaultMainLoopModelSetting()
Conversation history as JSONL append-only log with per-project session filtering
Pasted content deduplication: large pastes to external store, small inline, lazy resolution
Memory path resolution with entrypoint truncation (200 lines, 25KB max)
Team memory sync via watchers with secret scanning guards across team boundaries
Nested memory attachments deduped via loadedNestedMemoryPaths Set
Turn-scoped skill discovery tracking via discoveredSkillNames Set
Migrations as versioned schema adapters running idempotently at startup
Strict tool result pairing in SDK mode — fail fast instead of synthetic placeholders
Lazy module loading for feature-gated code via bun:bundle + lazy require
Query tracking with chainId+depth for multi-agent call correlation
Tokenization estimation cache (3 chars approx 1 token) for real-time context window checks
Task budget tracking across compaction — cumulative so server doesnt under-count
Content replacement state for tool result storage budget management
Abort controller hierarchy: parent abort cascels child, shareAbortController opt-in
System prompt injection for ant-only cache breaking (debug feature)
Git status snapshot memoized once per conversation at start
Coordinator mode context injection via feature-gated getCoordinatorUserContext()
Thinking config: adaptive (model chooses) or disabled (budget_tokens=0)
Organization managed settings async loading with timeout to prevent deadlock
Message normalization at API boundary strips UI-only elements
Tool use summaries compress tool calls for context preservation during compaction
Snip compaction for long sessions — SDK snips early, REPL keeps full history with projection
